title: Dimension Shift
description: The Minecraft 'Dimension Shift' mod: Two dimensions, one location. Switch with a button press. Endless possibilities!
body:
Want to have multiple bases in the same location?

 

With the Minecraft "Dimension Shift" mod, you can!

 

This mod introduces a brand new dimension that's an exact replica of the overworld, giving you the option to have two homes in the same location - one in each dimension.

What's more, you can easily switch between dimensions with just a press of a button, and you can now customize the dimension shift hotkey.

Plus, with the new command "/canshiftdim", you can decide who has the ability to shift dimensions.

 

And, if you're looking for a new resource to add to your collection, the "Alternative Diamond" can now be found exclusively in the Alternativ Dimension when the "spawnAlternativeDiamonds" gamerule is enabled.

 

This mod offers endless possibilities for exploration, resource gathering, and more.

 

Please note that it only works with normal map generation and was made using MCreator.

 

We hope you enjoy the new features and enhancements brought by this update!

 

curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dimension-shift-mod
